annotations.anchor_quote: It is an undeniable reality that by enlarging the female mind with education, there will be end to blind obedience, yet there are Various reasons which inhibit the process; consequently women across the globe suffer detrimental impacts. Hence, pragmatic policies and actions are needed to stream line women education
annotations.correction: It is an undeniable reality that by enlarging the female mind with education, there will be an end to blind obedience; however, various reasons inhibit the process, causing detrimental impacts to women globally. This essay examines benefits, impediments, and required measures.
annotations.comment: Introduction states thesis but lacks concise overview of main arguments; add roadmap previewing benefits, impediments, and measures.

annotations.anchor_quote: II. How strengthening the female mind by enlarging it with education Godsends blind obedience:
annotations.correction: II. Benefits: How female education ends blind obedience
annotations.comment: Outline header is wordy and repetitive of title; simplify for clarity and direct relevance to essay topic.

annotations.anchor_quote: there will be end to blind obedience
annotations.correction: there will be an end to blind obedience
annotations.comment: Add article 'an' before 'end' to correct indefinite article usage.

annotations.anchor_quote: Females strengthened by education lencew their rights and do not submit to injustice.
annotations.correction: Females strengthened by education know their rights and do not submit to injustice.
annotations.comment: Replace 'lencew' with 'know' to fix misspelling and ensure grammatical clarity.

annotations.anchor_quote: Educated female secures economic independence which protects from obeying mindlessly
annotations.correction: Educated females secure economic independence, which protects them from obeying mindlessly.
annotations.comment: Pluralize 'female' to 'females' for consistency, add comma before 'which', and insert 'them' for complete relative clause.

annotations.anchor_quote: NV. Conclusion.
annotations.correction: V. Conclusion: Restate thesis on education ending obedience, summarize benefits, impediments, measures.
annotations.comment: Conclusion marker lacks content previewing essay summary; add structured points for balance and completeness.

annotations.anchor_quote: 3. In Pakistan, ensure implementation of Article 25, and Article 38
annotations.correction: 3. In Pakistan, fully implement Article 25-A for education access and Article 38 for welfare to overcome poverty and govt gaps.
annotations.comment: Sub-point is descriptive without analysis; add cause-effect on how it eliminates specific impediments like child marriages.

annotations.anchor_quote: Article 25, and Article 38
annotations.correction: Article 25-A (right to education) and Article 38 (social welfare) of the Pakistani Constitution.
annotations.comment: Articles lack source attribution; cite Pakistani Constitution and link to female education barriers for verifiability.

annotations.anchor_quote: Unfortunately, there are various social, economic, political and traditional hindrances in way of educating the females.
annotations.correction: Unfortunately, there are various social, economic, political, and traditional hindrances in the way of educating females; this essay will discuss benefits, impediments, measures, and conclusion.
annotations.comment: Introduction addresses hindrances but lacks concise overview of main arguments and essay structure; add roadmap sentence previewing benefits, impediments, and measures.

annotations.anchor_quote: By enlarging the femal mind is by virtue of educating them makes them better not only for their own good but also for the entire society.
annotations.correction: By enlarging the female mind through education, they become better not only for their own good but also for the entire society.
annotations.comment: Garbled sentence with spelling error 'femal' and run-on structure; revise for clarity and grammatical correctness.

annotations.anchor_quote: Any one who is educated, questions, thinks, rationalizes and only then make an action.
annotations.correction: Anyone who is educated questions, thinks, rationalizes, and only then makes an action.
annotations.comment: Subject-verb agreement error ('make' should be 'makes') and missing comma after introductory phrase; correct for proper grammar.

annotations.anchor_quote: They question and rationalize and only than decide on whether to comply or not.
annotations.correction: They question and rationalize before deciding whether to comply or not.
annotations.comment: Repeats earlier idea of questioning and rationalizing; consolidate to avoid redundancy and fix 'than' to 'then'.

annotations.anchor_quote: They make more than 50% of the world population
annotations.correction: Women make up approximately 50% of the world population (cite UN data).
annotations.comment: Factual claim lacks source attribution; add reliable reference like UN statistics for verification.

annotations.anchor_quote: deprivation neves break. However, hot all hope is lost
annotations.correction: deprivation never breaks. However, not all hope is lost
annotations.comment: Misspelled words 'neves' and 'hot' confuse meaning; correct to 'never' and 'not' for proper readability.

annotations.anchor_quote: what women cando, or can not; what women can wear or wear not; what women can feel or feel not.
annotations.correction: what women can do, or cannot; what women can wear or cannot wear; what women can feel or cannot feel.

annotations.anchor_quote: This mind set decides what women cando, or can not; what women can wear or wear not; what women can feel or feel not. It also confuses and chains on the complexities of gender- women ed roles and nurturing roles as daughters, mothers, wives and sisters.

annotations.anchor_quote: To conclude, it can be deduced that embellishing the female mind with education will protect her from blind compliance. She will rationalize before she does anything which will not only make her better, but world better. There are grave impediments that stops women education process but there is nothing that can not be changed and with attidumal change and policy implementation educating women can be come much more convenient not just for their own person hood but for the progress of the world.
annotations.correction: To conclude, education protects women from blind compliance by enabling rational decision-making, as outlined in benefits, despite impediments that can be overcome through attitudinal change and policy enforcement, benefiting individual personhood and world progress.
annotations.comment: Conclusion restates thesis and summarizes vaguely without tying back to specific arguments; strengthen by previewing key benefits, impediments, measures, and adding forward-looking stance.
